_comment: Bricks element registry. Single source of truth for per-element metadata used by the build pipeline and read paths. Each entry describes one Bricks element type.
_maintenance: Per-element fields: valid_parents (required, array of allowed parent types or 'root'), accepts_children (required, bool), typical_children (optional, array for containers), content_key (optional, string — the Bricks settings key that schema.content maps to), default_tag (optional, string — default HTML tag), flex_by_default (optional, bool — pipeline auto-applies _display:flex), structural (optional, bool — a layout element rather than content), skip_auto_flex (optional, bool — nested elements that manage their own layout), nestable (optional, bool — Bricks nestable element with child-element support), element_settings_defaults (optional, object — sane defaults merged into settings when no element_settings given), working_example (optional, object — minimal valid settings returned by bricks:get_element_schemas; also used as content_key fallback), purpose (optional, string — one-line description served to AI), capabilities (optional, array — what the element can do), rules (optional, array — do's and don'ts for the AI), notes (optional, string — free-form hints).

accordion.notes: Deprecated base version. Use accordion-nested for customizable accordion content — its child divs are the panes.
accordion.purpose: Deprecated — use accordion-nested for customizable accordion content

accordion-nested.notes: Each accordion item is a div child.
capabilities: multiple panels with any nested content

alert.purpose: Notification banner — info, success, warning, error
rules: content goes in the alert text setting; choose alert type for color

animated-typing.notes: Compositional element — 'prefix' + animated 'strings' array + 'suffix'. schema.content maps to prefix (static text before animation). Use element_settings for the 'strings' array with actual animated words.
animated-typing.purpose: Typewriter / typing animation effect — cycles through a list of strings
rules: use element_settings.strings (array of strings to cycle), typeSpeed (ms per char)

audio.notes: HTML5 audio player. Supply a media URL or attachment ID.
audio.purpose: HTML5 audio player — podcasts, music, sound clips

back-to-top.notes: Nestable back-to-top button. Children define the button content (icon + optional label).
back-to-top.purpose: Scroll-to-top button — fixed position, appears on scroll
capabilities: nestable — icon + text children define button content

block.purpose: Structural grouping — columns, rows, card wrappers
capabilities: semantic HTML tags (ul, li, article, nav, figure)
rules: use block for horizontal rows — NOT div (div ignores _direction)

breadcrumbs.purpose: Breadcrumb navigation trail — Home > Parent > Current page

capabilities: ICON support — native icon left/right of text (ti-mobile, ti-comment-alt, etc.)
link with tel: or https:// URL
style variants via class_intent (primary, outline, ghost)
rules: use native icon feature — do NOT put emoji in button text

carousel.notes: Simple carousel element (non-nested). For custom carousel content, use slider-nested with div children.
carousel.purpose: Simple post carousel — use slider-nested for custom content slides
capabilities: dynamic data fields from posts query
PHP execution when dangerous actions enabled
rules: requires 'Dangerous Actions' toggle enabled in plugin settings for PHP

container.purpose: Content container inside a section — controls max-width and centering
rules: DO NOT set _gap — child theme handles it
use multiple containers for multiple visual rows

countdown.notes: Countdown timer to a target date/time.
countdown.purpose: Countdown timer to a target date/time — launches, events, sales

custom-title.notes: Custom title element with separate title and subtitle fields.
custom-title.purpose: Decorative title with separate subtitle field
capabilities: title + subtitle rendered as one element

div.notes: Does NOT default to flex. Requires explicit _display: flex for flex layouts.
div.purpose: Small wrapper — icon circles, overlays, decorative containers
rules: does NOT support _direction — use block instead for rows

dropdown.notes: Dropdown menu container (nestable). Children are the dropdown items.
dropdown.purpose: Dropdown menu container — for navigation submenus
capabilities: hover or click trigger via element_settings.trigger

facebook-page.purpose: Facebook Page embed widget — timeline, events feed

form.notes: Schema must supply 'fields' array via element_settings. The pipeline no longer injects default field templates — AI must specify newsletter/contact/login fields explicitly per site language/branding.
capabilities: text fields, email, textarea, select, checkbox

working_example.successMessage: Message successfully sent. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

capabilities: HTML in content — use text for colored words
tag: h1 for page titles, h2 for sections, h3-h4 for cards
rules: DO NOT set font-size, color, line-height, font-weight — child theme handles all heading styles

capabilities: Themify icon library (ti-truck, ti-shield, ti-timer, etc.)

icon-box.notes: Content key is 'content' (HTML body), verified against Bricks 2.3 working_example. 'title' is a separate heading field, not the content.
icon-box.purpose: Feature card — icon + heading + text combined
capabilities: built-in icon, title, and description fields
good for feature grids and service highlights

image-gallery.notes: Gallery of images. Supports loadMoreInitial / loadMoreStep / loadMoreInfiniteScroll for progressive loading.
image-gallery.purpose: Image gallery grid with optional lightbox

instagram-feed.notes: Instagram feed embed. Requires Instagram API token configuration.
instagram-feed.purpose: Instagram feed embed — displays recent posts from account
capabilities: follow button with custom text and icon
requires Instagram API token in Bricks settings

logo.notes: Site logo element. Shows site logo image or text fallback.
logo.purpose: Site logo — image with text fallback
capabilities: auto-fetches site logo from WordPress settings

map.notes: Google Maps embed with address or coordinates.
map.purpose: Google Maps embed with markers and controls
rules: requires Google Maps API key in Bricks settings

map-connector.notes: Map connector element — links multiple map markers or locations.
capabilities: links multiple map address points visually

map-leaflet.notes: Leaflet (OpenStreetMap) embed — no API key required.
map-leaflet.purpose: OpenStreetMap embed via Leaflet — no API key required

nav-menu.notes: WordPress menu widget. Renders a registered WP nav menu. For custom navigation, use nav-nested.
nav-menu.purpose: WordPress registered menu — renders a saved WP nav menu
rules: for custom navigation with dropdowns and nested content, use nav-nested instead

nav-nested.purpose: Custom navigation menu — full nesting control for mega menus
capabilities: mega menu support with any nested content

offcanvas.notes: Off-canvas slide-in panel (nestable). Triggered by a toggle/button.
offcanvas.purpose: Slide-in panel — mobile menus, sidebars, filter panels

pagination.notes: Query pagination — use inside or after a query loop.
pagination.purpose: Query loop pagination — prev/next/numbered page links
rules: place after or inside a posts/query loop element
use element_settings.percent (integer 0-100), barColor and trackColor are {raw} color objects

popup.notes: Popup content container (nestable). Lives inside a popup template.
popup.purpose: Popup/modal content container — lives inside popup templates
capabilities: nestable — any content inside the modal
trigger conditions (click, scroll, exit intent, timed delay)
close on overlay click or button
rules: must be placed inside a popup template type — see bricks:get_knowledge('popups')

post-author.notes: Single post author bio box — avatar, name, bio, links.
post-author.purpose: Author bio box — avatar, name, bio, website links
capabilities: toggle avatar, name, website, bio, posts link individually

post-comments.notes: WordPress comments section for a single post.
post-comments.purpose: WordPress comments section with reply form

post-content.notes: Renders the post content (the_content). Use in single post templates.
post-content.purpose: Renders the full post body content (the_content)

post-excerpt.notes: Renders the post excerpt. Use in archive loops or single post templates.
capabilities: for archive loops or single post templates

post-meta.notes: Displays post metadata — author, date, comments, categories. Uses dynamic data tags.
post-meta.purpose: Post metadata display — author, date, comments count
capabilities: for single post or archive templates

post-navigation.notes: Previous/next post links for single post templates.
post-navigation.purpose: Previous/next post links for single post templates

post-reading-progress-bar.notes: Reading progress bar that fills as user scrolls through post content.
post-reading-progress-bar.purpose: Reading progress indicator — fills as user scrolls
capabilities: auto-tracks scroll position vs content length

post-reading-time.notes: Estimated reading time display for the current post.

post-sharing.notes: Social sharing buttons for the current post.
post-sharing.purpose: Social sharing buttons for the current post
capabilities: Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Pinterest, Telegram, Email

post-taxonomy.notes: Displays post taxonomy terms (categories, tags). Use in post templates.
post-taxonomy.purpose: Post taxonomy terms — categories or tags as links

post-title.notes: Dynamic post title element for single post templates.
post-title.purpose: Dynamic post title — pulls from current post
capabilities: for single post or archive templates

post-toc.notes: Auto-generated table of contents from post headings.
post-toc.purpose: Auto-generated table of contents from post headings

posts.notes: Post listing / query loop element. Displays posts with configurable fields and layout.
posts.purpose: Post listing / query loop — blog grids, archives, related content
capabilities: dynamic data fields per post card
use with pagination element for multi-page results
rules: pair with pagination element for paged results
use bricks:get_knowledge('query-loops') for query parameters

capabilities: plan name, price, features list, CTA button

progress-bar.purpose: Animated horizontal progress bar — for skill bars, completion meters
capabilities: multiple bars in one element via "bars" array
rules: use element_settings.bars for an array of {label, percentage} objects
pair with a heading for context

query-results-summary.notes: Shows 'Showing X of Y results' text for query loops.
query-results-summary.purpose: Query results count text — 'Showing X of Y results'
rules: place inside or near a posts/query loop element

rating.purpose: Star rating display (or other icon) — for review summaries, product ratings
rules: use element_settings.rating (number 0-maxRating)

related-posts.notes: Related posts based on shared taxonomy terms. Use in single post templates.
related-posts.purpose: Related posts grid based on shared taxonomy terms

search.notes: Search form element with optional overlay mode.
search.purpose: Search form — inline or fullscreen overlay mode

section.purpose: Full-width page section — the outermost wrapper
rules: DO NOT set _padding — child theme handles it
only contains containers as direct children

shortcode.notes: Renders a WordPress shortcode. Supply the shortcode string.
shortcode.purpose: WordPress shortcode renderer — any registered shortcode

sidebar.purpose: WordPress widget sidebar area — legacy widget integration

slider.notes: Deprecated base version. Use slider-nested — each slide is a div child.
slider.purpose: Deprecated — use slider-nested for custom slide content with full nesting

slider-nested.purpose: Image or content carousel/slideshow (Splide.js under the hood)
capabilities: multiple slides with any nested content
configurable slides per view, gap, speed, loop
rules: Bricks uses Splide.js — NOT Swiper. Use Splide setting keys.
perPage (string) — slides visible at once. e.g. '4'. NOT slidesToShow or slidesPerView.
gap (string) — space between slides in px. Use 'var(--content-gap)' or 'var(--grid-gap)' from design system. NOT spaceBetween.
arrows (bool) — show prev/next navigation arrows.
dots (bool) — show pagination dots.
autoplay (bool) — auto-advance slides.
speed (int) — transition speed in ms.
loop (bool) — infinite loop.
centeredSlides (bool) — center the active slide.
Each slide is a div (or block) child of the slider-nested element.
slider-nested.notes: Bricks slider-nested uses Splide.js. Key names: perPage (not slidesToShow/slidesPerView), gap (not spaceBetween), arrows (not navigation), dots (not pagination). Always use CSS variables for gap (e.g. var(--content-gap)).

slot.notes: Template slot — placeholder for content injection in template hierarchies.
slot.purpose: Template slot — content injection point for component architecture
capabilities: placeholder filled by parent template or component

social-icons.purpose: Row of social media icons with links
rules: each icon needs a URL; pair with a heading for context

svg.notes: Inline SVG element. Content stored in 'code' or 'file' setting.
svg.purpose: Inline SVG — icons, illustrations, decorative shapes at any size
capabilities: inline SVG code or file reference
preserves vector quality at any resolution

tabs.notes: Deprecated base version. Use tabs-nested — its child divs are the tab panes (tabs-nested supports rich content per pane; plain tabs only takes a string repeater).
tabs.purpose: Deprecated — use tabs-nested for rich tab content with full nesting

tabs-nested.notes: Each tab pane is a div child.
tabs-nested.purpose: Tabbed content panels — each tab has full nested content
capabilities: multiple tab panes with any content inside
rules: use tabs-nested NOT tabs — basic tabs only support plain text

team-members.notes: Team member cards with photo, name, role, and description.
team-members.purpose: Team member cards — photo, name, role, description
capabilities: repeater with title, subtitle, description per member

template.notes: Embeds another Bricks template (header, footer, section, content).
template.purpose: Embed another Bricks template — reusable sections, headers, footers
capabilities: renders any saved Bricks template by ID
header, footer, section, or content template types

testimonials.purpose: Customer testimonial carousel/cards — quotes with author info
capabilities: repeater with quote text, author name, job title

text.purpose: Rich text block — paragraphs with full HTML formatting
capabilities: HTML content with bold, italic, links, spans
rules: for plain text without HTML formatting, prefer text-basic

text-basic.purpose: Paragraph or body text — descriptions, subtitles, taglines, eyebrows
capabilities: can be styled as tagline/eyebrow via class_intent
rules: DO NOT set font-size, color, line-height — child theme handles body text styles

toggle.notes: Toggle button — triggers the visibility of a target element (offcanvas, dropdown, etc.).
toggle.purpose: Toggle button — triggers visibility of target elements
capabilities: nestable — button content is fully customizable
triggers offcanvas, dropdown, or any element by ID

toggle-mode.notes: Bricks 2.3+ light/dark mode toggle button. No content — configured via icon/iconColor/iconSize + iconDark/iconDarkColor/iconDarkSize + ariaLabel.
capabilities: separate icons for light and dark states
YouTube, Vimeo, or self-hosted video URL

wordpress.notes: WordPress widget element. Wraps any WP widget (archives, categories, recent posts, etc.).
wordpress.purpose: WordPress widget wrapper — renders classic WP widgets
capabilities: archives, categories, recent posts, tag cloud, meta, search
legacy widget integration for non-Bricks content
